tweets.content: RT by @elonmusk: As we celebrate America's 250th birthday with @Freedom250, we're reminded that our nation's story has always been defined by people willing to take on big challenges. @POTUS launched the Artemis program with a bold vision for America's future in space. Today, we're carrying that vision forward by returning to the Moon, building a permanent presence, and preparing for where we inevitably go next.
tweets.translated: RT @elonmusk：当我们与@Freedom250 一起庆祝美国 250 岁生日时，我们被提醒，我们国家的故事始终是由愿意接受重大挑战的人们来定义的。 @POTUS 启动了阿尔忒弥斯计划，对美国的太空未来抱有大胆的愿景。今天，我们正在通过返回月球、建立永久存在并为我们下一步不可避免的去向做好准备来推进这一愿景。

tweets.content: RT by @cz_binance: 热知识：由于订单簿深度、交易量等原因 币安的交易深度遥遥领先 大额交易在交易所中磨损最低 冷知识：100万刀交易平均滑点 币安是1.67、OKX是4.47、Bybit是7.42 @cz_binance @heyibinance @binancezh mame-inu:native

RT by @cz_binance: If you haven't watched CZ's interview with The Block yet, it's worth your time. 👇 https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=KdyvngusgtQ One thing I admire about @cz_binance is how clear his priorities are after stepping down as CEO. Instead of slowing down, he shifted his focus to creating long-term impact: • @GiggleAcademy — making education accessible to millions. • @yzilabs — supporting founders and innovation. • Advising governments on blockchain adoption. • Mentoring and investing in promising startups. 😎What surprised me most? He said he doesn't plan five or ten years ahead anymore. He focuses on the next few months because opportunities and technology evolve so quickly. Sometimes, the clearest vision isn't having a rigid long-term plan—it's knowing your mission and adapting along the way.
tweets.translated: RT by @cz_binance：如果你还没有看过 CZ 接受 The Block 的采访，那么值得你花时间。 👇 https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=KdyvngusgtQ 我欣赏 @cz_binance 的一件事是，他在辞去首席执行官职务后，优先事项是多么清晰。他没有放慢脚步，而是将重点转向创造长期影响： • @GiggleAcademy — 让数百万人接受教育。 • @yzilabs — 支持创始人和创新。 • 就区块链的采用向政府提供建议。 • 指导和投资有前途的初创企业。 😎最让我惊讶的是什么？他说他不再计划未来五年或十年。他专注于接下来的几个月，因为机会和技术发展得如此之快。有时，最清晰的愿景并不是制定严格的长期计划，而是了解自己的使命并不断适应。

tweets.content: RT by @cz_binance: Binance spends $300M every year on compliance. 1,500+ employees work to keep users safe. Binance stopped $10.53B in potential fraud (2025–Q1 2026), Recovered $114M from hacks in 2025 + $60.2M in 2026 so far. People can say a lot about #Binance But this kind of user protection is rarely seen in crypto.
tweets.translated: @cz_binance 转发：币安每年在合规性方面花费 3 亿美元。 1,500 多名员工致力于确保用户安全。币安阻止了 10.53B 美元的潜在欺诈（2025 年至 2026 年第一季度），2025 年从黑客攻击中追回了 1.14 亿美元，2026 年迄今为止追回了 6020 万美元。人们可以对 #Binance 说很多话，但这种用户保护在加密领域很少见。

tweets.content: Pinned: POLL: ICE has been abused by the Fake News Media at levels never seen before. They are Great Patriots who work hard, and do a fantastic job in a very hostile environment. Much of this hostility is caused by the Dumocrats and the Fake News. The concept I have had for quite some time — A strong feeling that the name of these Patriots, “ICE,” should be changed to, “NICE,” in that it will totally discombobulate Crooked, Dishonest, and Unpatriotic Reporters and Journalists. For them to say, “We went to a NICE Facility today,” as opposed to “ICE” or, “NICE Agents have deported a Violent Drug Dealer,” they won’t be able to handle it, they will go totally crazy! All it means is adding an “N” (“National”) to “ICE (“Immigration and Customs Enforcement”) — A much more prestigious name. Everyone loves it, but I have been told by the legendary Tom Homan that the Agents do not love it as much as the other population. Who thinks that we should add an “N” to change the name of “ICE” to “NICE?”   Thank you for your attention to this matter! President DJT
tweets.translated: 已固定：民意调查：假新闻媒体对 ICE 的滥用达到了前所未有的程度。他们是伟大的爱国者，他们努力工作，在非常恶劣的环境中做得非常出色。这种敌意很大程度上是由杜民主派和假新闻引起的。我有一段时间一直有这样的想法——一种强烈的感觉，这些爱国者的名字“ICE”应该改为“NICE”，因为这将彻底扰乱不诚实、不诚实、不爱国的记者和记者。对于他们来说，“我们今天去了一家 NICE 设施”，而不是“ICE”或“NICE 特工驱逐了一名暴力毒贩”，他们将无法处理，他们会完全疯掉！这意味着在“ICE”（“移民和海关执法局”）中添加一个“N”（“国家”）——一个更有声望的名字。每个人都喜欢它，但传奇人物汤姆·霍曼告诉我，特工们并不像其他人那样喜欢它。谁认为我们应该添加一个“N”来将“ICE”的名字改为“NICE”？   感谢您对此事的关注！总裁DJT

tweets.content: For robotics companies, I have a favorable view on Unitree and Agility Robotics, two humanoid players. And I have largest concentration in Agility Robotics, since I personally prefer US humanoid players. For upstream component exposure, I currently own: - Harmonic Drive (6324) given high content BOM on things like harmonic reduction gear. - Vishay Precision for sensors and a possible candidate for Telsa Optimus. LeaderDrive (688017) and Schaeffler I have favorable views on but don't own personally. Many of the other AI DC players, I have indirect exposure to robotics like memory. Don't recommend anyone to copy, just sharing personal positions/thoughts. Humanoid sector is large, and as seen with Goldman Sachs report that "Korean companies will command a 30% direct and indirect share of global humanoid robot production". Lot of players out there globally. This was an older report but just linking it again since you see all of them pop up in GS institutional reports + what they cover. Agility Robotics is my personal favorite as of now.
tweets.translated: 对于机器人公司，我看好Unitree和Agility Robotics这两家人形机器人公司。我最关注的是 Agility Robotics，因为我个人更喜欢美国的类人机器人玩家。对于上游组件暴露，我目前拥有： - Harmonic Drive (6324)，给出了谐波减速齿轮等高内容 BOM。 - Vishay Precision 传感器和 Telsa Optimus 的可能候选者。我对LeaderDrive (688017) 和舍弗勒有好感，但个人并不认同。许多其他 AI DC 玩家，我都间接接触过像记忆这样的机器人技术。不建议任何人复制，仅分享个人立场/想法。人形机器人行业规模庞大，高盛报告称“韩国公司将直接和间接占据全球人形机器人生产的 30% 份额”。全球有很多玩家。这是一份较旧的报告，但只是再次链接它，因为您会看到所有这些报告都出现在 GS 机构报告中以及它们所涵盖的内容。到目前为止，Agility Robotics 是我个人最喜欢的。

tweets.content: Japan's Rakuten to establish joint venture with $ASTS to build out LEO satellite networks for Japan per Digitimes/Nikkei. "The move is widely viewed as a strategic response to the growing influence of $SPCX Starlink in Japan"
tweets.translated: 据 Digitimes/Nikkei 报道，日本乐天公司将与 $ASTS 成立合资企业，为日本建设 LEO 卫星网络。 “此举被广泛视为对 $SPCX Starlink 在日本日益增长的影响力的战略回应”

tweets.content: $GM cuts 1,000 workers and replaces them with 50 robots (Jun 22nd report) Reports also show GM is working on a deal with $NVDA on factory robotics. This is industry validation for robotics, since it likely demonstrates increased opex margins + efficiency from employee automation. Especially from companies like $AMZN to General Motors with assembly/warehouse lines that have high headcount. I think the technology is already here and use cases are already proven. Robotics/Humanoids are just pre-scale right now. The wording from large companies is “assistive robotics”… But in all honesty, it’s here to automate away the human workforce and increase profitability. I don’t think companies want to be paying insurance, salaries, etc. when robots can do a better job, and 24/7, so very sad to see potential job losses in the future from robotics automation. Whether people like it or not; seems like the inflection point for robotics is here.
tweets.translated: $GM 裁员 1,000 名，并用 50 台机器人取代他们（6 月 22 日报道） 报道还显示，通用汽车正在与 $NVDA 就工厂机器人技术达成一项协议。这是对机器人技术的行业验证，因为它可能证明了员工自动化带来的运营支出利润率和效率的提高。尤其是像 $AMZN 和通用汽车这样拥有大量员工的装配/仓库生产线的公司。我认为这项技术已经存在并且用例已经得到验证。机器人/人形机器人目前只是预规模。大公司的措辞是“辅助机器人”……但老实说，它的目的是自动化劳动力并提高盈利能力。我认为当机器人可以做得更好、24/7 时，公司不想支付保险、工资等，所以非常遗憾地看到机器人自动化未来可能会导致失业。不管人们喜欢与否；机器人技术的拐点似乎已经到来。
